prompt: Five friendly calculator characters in a row, each with a distinct personality -- COUNT holds a clicker tally, SUM has a plus sign, AVG balances on a scale, MIN points down to the floor, MAX reaches up to the ceiling
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. Five friendly calculator characters in a row, each with a distinct personality -- COUNT holds a clicker tally, SUM has a plus sign, AVG balances on a scale, MIN points down to the floor, MAX reaches up to the ceiling Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
